name: electron-tools
description: Windows-first Electron imaging shell prototype with Photoshop-like document windows.

scripts.dev:run: wait-on dist-electron/electron/main.js http://127.0.0.1:5173 && cmd /C "set ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=&& set VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173&& electron ."
scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron && npm run build:engine
scripts.build:engine: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$cargo = (Get-Command cargo -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Source; if (-not $cargo) { $candidate = Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE '.cargo\\bin\\cargo.exe'; if (Test-Path $candidate) { $cargo = $candidate } }; if (-not $cargo) { throw 'cargo executable was not found.' }; & $cargo build --manifest-path native/engine/Cargo.toml"
scripts.build:engine:release: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$cargo = (Get-Command cargo -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Source; if (-not $cargo) { $candidate = Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE '.cargo\\bin\\cargo.exe'; if (Test-Path $candidate) { $cargo = $candidate } }; if (-not $cargo) { throw 'cargo executable was not found.' }; & $cargo build --release --manifest-path native/engine/Cargo.toml"
scripts.start: npm run build:engine && cmd /C "set ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=&& electron ."
